---
title: "The Rev. William Palmer"
---

## The Rev. William Palmer

**Dates:** (12 July 1811-5 April 1879)

### Description

elder brother of the 1st Earl of Selborne

### Biography

Educated at Rugby and Magdalen College, Oxford, of which he was a fellow 1832-55, he became a Roman Catholic in 1855.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31st 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
